body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule F 2025 contribution to the health services fund.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.F-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule F numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 18130
Value: 63060
Value: 1
Value: 0.01
Value: 150
Value: 1000
Value: 0

Schedule F Part A calculates income subject to the health services fund contribution. Line 10 adds total income on TP-1 line 199 and the income averaging amount for forest producers included on line 276. The form states that if this result is $18,130 or less, no contribution is payable. Line 16 combines employment income on line 101 and the correction of employment income on line 105. Line 18 subtracts line 16 from line 10 and repeats the $18,130 no-contribution threshold. Line 34 adds amounts allocated under a profit-sharing plan, Old Age Security pension, dividend gross-up, support payments received, social assistance, income replacement indemnities and net federal supplements, scholarships and similar assistance, spousal RRSP deduction recovery, and other listed income. Line 36 subtracts line 34 from line 18 and again applies the $18,130 no-contribution threshold. Line 68 adds the deductions listed on lines 41 through 62. Line 70 subtracts line 68 from line 36 and again applies the $18,130 no-contribution threshold.

Schedule F Part B calculates the contribution. If income subject to contribution on line 70 is $63,060 or less, line 77 subtracts $18,130, line 80 multiplies the excess by 1%, line 81 adds $0, and line 82 caps the result at $150. If income subject to contribution is more than $63,060, line 77 subtracts $63,060, line 80 multiplies the excess by 1%, line 81 adds $150, and line 82 caps the result at $1,000. Line 82 is carried to TP-1 line 446.
